mapper.sql: id, business_order_no, business_type, pay_method, third_party_trade_no, actual_amount, pay_status, pay_success_time, original_callback, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_payment_flow order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_payment_flow set business_order_no = #{et.businessOrderNo}, business_type = #{et.businessType}, pay_method = #{et.payMethod}, third_party_trade_no = #{et.thirdPartyTradeNo}, actual_amount = #{et.actualAmount}, pay_status = #{et.payStatus}, pay_success_time = #{et.paySuccessTime}, original_callback = #{et.originalCallback}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
